summary.en: Mozambique does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC directive for power tools, but motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, and chargers are still expected to control electromagnetic disturbance under adopted NM/IEC technical norms and INNOQ conformity. EMC evidence based on the relevant CISPR/IEC test methods is commonly requested in the technical package and assessed through national conformity and import inspection rather than a separate EMC mark.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克并未对电动工具实行欧盟式独立 EMC 指令，但电机驱动工具、电子调速器和充电器仍需按采纳的 NM/IEC 技术规范和 INNOQ 符合性控制电磁骚扰。基于相关 CISPR/IEC 测试方法的 EMC 证据通常在技术资料中被要求，并通过国家符合性和进口检验评估，而非单独的 EMC 标识。
summary.zht: 莫三比克並未對電動工具實行歐盟式獨立 EMC 指令，但電機驅動工具、電子調速器和充電器仍需按採納的 NM/IEC 技術規範和 INNOQ 符合性控制電磁騷擾。基於相關 CISPR/IEC 測試方法的 EMC 證據通常在技術資料中被要求，並通過國家符合性和進口檢驗評估，而非單獨的 EMC 標識。

standards_or_laws: Adopted NM standards referencing CISPR/IEC EMC test methods
INNOQ national conformity and import-inspection framework
IEC 62841 EMC-related clauses where invoked for power tools

summary.en: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports, often using GB equivalents of CISPR limits. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, and charger inclusion still need review against the adopted NM reference and INNOQ expectations.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 EMC 报告，常采用 CISPR 限值的 GB 等同标准。测试限值、配置、最不利工况以及是否包含充电器，仍需对照采纳的 NM 引用和 INNOQ 要求复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 EMC 報告，常採用 CISPR 限值的 GB 等同標準。測試限值、配置、最不利工況以及是否包含充電器，仍需對照採納的 NM 引用和 INNOQ 要求覆核。

standards_or_laws: China GB EMC standards aligned with CISPR where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is an EMC report that tests only the bare tool and omits the charger, battery pack, or worst-case load, or one that is not mapped to the adopted NM reference INNOQ recognizes. The Mozambique package should show the exact marketed configuration and tie the EMC evidence to national conformity, not assume an EU EMC declaration transfers automatically.
gap.zh: 常见差距是 EMC 报告只测试裸工具，遗漏充电器、电池包或最不利负载，或未映射到 INNOQ 认可的采纳 NM 引用。莫桑比克资料应显示实际销售配置，并将 EMC 证据与国家符合性挂钩，而不能假定欧盟 EMC 声明可自动转用。
gap.zht: 常見差距是 EMC 報告只測試裸工具，遺漏充電器、電池包或最不利負載，或未映射到 INNOQ 認可的採納 NM 引用。莫三比克資料應顯示實際銷售配置，並將 EMC 證據與國家符合性掛鉤，而不能假定歐盟 EMC 聲明可自動轉用。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional: no separate EU-style EMC mark, but EMC disturbance control via adopted NM/IEC norms is commonly required as part of INNOQ national conformity and import inspection for motorized tools and chargers.
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic files may include GB EMC evidence, but Mozambique acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and NM mapping.

source.publisher: INNOQ - Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade （Mozambique）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Mozambique-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system, is mapped to the adopted NM reference, and is accepted through INNOQ national conformity and import inspection. There is no standalone EMC product mark, so EMC is handled inside the conformity package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售的工具系统、映射到采纳的 NM 引用，并通过 INNOQ 国家符合性和进口检验接受之前，不能视为莫桑比克就绪。不存在独立 EMC 产品标识，故 EMC 在符合性资料内处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售的工具系統、映射到採納的 NM 引用，並通過 INNOQ 國家符合性和進口檢驗接受之前，不能視為莫三比克就緒。不存在獨立 EMC 產品標識，故 EMC 在符合性資料內處理。
